ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Logo_Rights_Opt_Out__c = TRUE, ISCHANGED(Logo_Rights__c), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Logo_Rights__c, "No name/logo rights")), NOT($Profile.Id='00eb0000000oBvc'), NOT($Profile.Id='00eb0000000dZws'), NOT($Profile.Id='00e0O000001BCym'), NOT($Profile.Id='00e0O0000016TUV'), NOT($Profile.Id='00e0O0000016Suc') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Logo Rights are Opt Out. If this Account should have Logo Rights please contact SalesOps.
